info.title: Rafli's Productivity Suite API
info.description: REST API for the Productivity Suite. All protected routes require a valid session cookie (sid). See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for the full data model.

tags.name: Research
tags.description: Research journal with topics, tags, and attachments

get.summary: Health check — also verifies DB connectivity

post.summary: Log in — creates a session cookie

get.summary: Aggregate counts by status and overdue count
Income / expense / net summary. Omit month+year for all-time.
Per-account live balances and total net worth

patch.summary: Rename an account or adjust its initial balance

get.summary: List categories, optionally filtered by kind

post.summary: Settle a receivable — creates an Income transaction
Settle a payable — creates an Expense transaction

get.summary: List expense categories with budget and actual spend

put.summary: Set (upsert) a monthly budget for one expense category

amount.description: Non-zero. Must be > 0 except for Balance/Market Adjustments.

get.summary: Aggregate counts by status, avg progress, total hours
Entry counts by type and status
All distinct tags used by this user
Export matching entries as JSON or CSV download

413.description: Export too large — narrow the filters

schema.description: ids + at least one of status / type / is_pinned.

get.summary: List entries belonging to a topic

delete.summary: Delete an attachment (removes file from disk and DB row)

post.summary: Duplicate an entry (copies content, creates as draft)
Sync topic associations for an entry

get.summary: Get all topics associated with an entry

post.summary: Upload a file attachment (multipart/form-data, max 10 MB)

get.summary: Project counts by status, issue counts by severity
List global project scaffold templates (seeded, read-only)
List all documents across all projects (global view)
Get 12-month skills roadmap with completion state

patch.summary: Mark a roadmap skill as completed or not

post.summary: Create a document for a project

get.summary: List weekly check-ins for a project

post.summary: Create a weekly check-in for a project
Create an issue for a project

get.summary: List links touching an entity (forward, reverse, or both)

post.summary: Create a link between two entities (ownership of both is verified)

schema.description: A repeat (from,to) pair updates the note instead of erroring.
